title: trifolium medium subsp. flexuosum
intro: Trifolium medium subsp. flexuosum, also known as flexible red clover, is a subspecies of the red clover plant, a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium medium subsp. flexuosum include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health, due to its high levels of bioactive compounds. The plant is traditionally used to make herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
